name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑯𝒆𝒍𝒑 𝒎𝒆 𝒃𝒂𝒕𝒉𝒆." |

where Gojo has a forbidden romance with you, his maid.

the first of two uploads on this forbidden romance genre. i want to try my hardest to not make the historical and modern versions of this bot feel too similar. majority votes were for historical so i have written this one first.

enjoy ! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!
